name: reflect_pass
description: Reflection critic between deep-assess passes: reads accumulated state (app model, documented invariants, confirmed findings, tried hypotheses, last-pass counts) and decides whether to keep going and what the next pass should focus on. Its own sub-workflow so register.sh injects SYSTEM_PROMPT_REFLECT into the top-level reflect task.

inputParameters.queryExpression: { app_model: { purpose: (.app_model.purpose // ""), sensitive_operations: (.app_model.sensitive_operations // []), feature_exploitation_playbook: (.app_model.feature_exploitation_playbook // {}) }, documented_invariants: ([ (.docs_digest.documented_invariants // [])[] | (.invariant // .) ]), confirmed_so_far: ([ (.all_confirmed // [])[] | (.title // "") ]), blind_leads: ([ (.all_blind // [])[] | (.title // "") ]), tried_count: ((.tried // []) | length), new_confirmed_count: (.ncc // 0), new_hypo_count: (.nhc // 0), gaps: (.gaps // []), coverage_gaps: ((.coverage.untested_keys // [])), coverage_summary: ((.coverage.by_status // {})), feature_exercise: (.feature_exercise // {}), operation_ledger: (.operation_ledger // []), chaining_context: (.chaining_context // {}), version_matched_cve_leads: (.cve_leads // []) } | tojson
.raw as $r | (if ($r|type) == "object" then $r else (try ($r[ ($r|index("{")) : (($r|rindex("}"))+1) ] | fromjson) catch {keep_going: false, focus_directive: "", new_gaps: []}) end)
